name: KeyHolder, Inc.
summary: KeyHolder, Inc. engages in advertising agency, casting, and digital content businesses in Japan. The company also engages in training school management business; TV, video, and movie production businesses for movie content and live performances; freight car transportation, and warehouse and cargo handling businesses; and general charter passenger car transportation business. In addition, it plans, develops, and produces live entertainment contents; and manages entertainment production and model production business. The company was formerly known as ADORES, Inc. and changed its name to KeyHolder, Inc. in October 2017. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
